scripts.dev: npm run build:core && concurrently -c auto -n core,server,client "npm:dev:core:watch" "npm:dev:server:only" "npm:dev:client:only"
scripts.dev:client: npm run build:core && npm --workspace @aquawetrix/client run dev
scripts.dev:core: npm run build:core && npm --workspace @aquawetrix/core run dev
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:core && npm --workspace @aquawetrix/server run dev
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:core && npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.clean: rimraf apps/client/dist apps/client/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo apps/server/dist apps/server/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/core/dist packages/core/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo coverage tempdist tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
